title: Quay Transfer Tensor: Minimal-Multiplication Crane Program
strategies: one multiplication per nonzero transfer entry (trivial per-entry CP)
rank factorization of the vessel-axis (axis-0) slabs (greedy, single fixed axis)
best-of-three-axes slab rank factorization (strong slice-rank bound)
true CP-rank / rational ALS search below the slab bound (open ceiling, uncovered)
